Dialog.name: MND_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I tended the rooftop planters with Junpei...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}You're gonna be a tasty little fella. Don't stop growin', ya hear?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}Not exactly huge, but what we lack in size we'll make up for in numbers![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}Don't be shy, my little veggies! You can grow faster, y'know![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_CHIDORILIVE
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}These little guys are pretty awesome. Lookin' at 'em makes you really think about life.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}They do make you feel better when you eat 'em. Maybe I'll take some with me next time...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The extra care is paying off,[n]and I can harvest more.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}I'd say that's some mighty fine work! Let's head back downstairs.[n]{f 1 1}
